sentences.translation: Poslovica kaže: «Znanje je svjetlo a neznanje je tama».
sentences.translationEn: The proverb says: «Knowledge is light and ignorance is darkness».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ الْعِلْمَ يُنِيرُ حَيَاتَنَا وَيُرْشِدُنَا.
sentences.translation: To znači da znanje osvjetljava naš život i vodi nas.
sentences.translationEn: This means that knowledge illuminates our lives and guides us.

sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَتْ لَيْلَى الْقِرَاءَةَ وَالْكِتَابَةَ وَهِيَ صَغِيرَةٌ.
sentences.translation: Lejla je naučila čitati i pisati dok je bila mala.
sentences.translationEn: Layla learned to read and write when she was young.

sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَتْ مُعَلِّمَةً وَسَاعَدَتْ كَثِيرًا مِنَ الأَطْفَالِ.
sentences.translation: Postala je učiteljica i pomogla je mnogoj djeci.
sentences.translationEn: She became a teacher and helped many children.
